title: paris verticillata subsp. manshurica
intro: Paris verticillata subsp. manshurica, also known as the Chinese Paris or Manshurian Paris, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Parisaceae. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Paris verticillata subsp. manshurica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving immune function, making it a popular remedy for respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or an infusion, and it can also be used to make herbal capsules or tinctures.
